channel.title: Extra on Alberto Ruiz Biestro
channel.description: Recent content in Extra on Alberto Ruiz Biestro

item.title: My research (for my parents)
item.description:
The big picture

Lemons come in various shapes and sizes.

Electrons are like the seeds from a lemon. We don’t really know where inside the lemon they are until we cut one open, but we’re pretty sure they’re there when we pick them from the tree.

The specifics
